feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: EC -> EP -> LMS user data in Intergration Center without "(ID)"
entry.content:
Hi,

We've been on BizX and LMS (without EC) for 8 years. We are about to deploy EC. Now the interface EC to EP, includes the IDs in parenthesis by default. Eg Department was "Sales North" becomes "Sales North (001013)".

We have a over 700 active Assignment profiles in the LMS with rules based on user data that is now changing to include the ID. And there is no way to mass-updated the values in the LMS APMs.

There is a document from SAP on this topic, stating there is a way to find columns without the ID in the Integration Center. At this point we are still searching...

I found I can use the "split text" function in calculated field, but I am not sure this is a safe way.

Has anyone else been through this ?

Any advise or suggestion?

Thanks.

Kris

entry.title: 1H 2026 Product Release - EC - Latest People Profile - New Edit & History UI
entry.content:
We have observed that the latest People Profile introduces stricter rules and validation compared to the previous version. Since adopting the new Edit & History UI, our company is encountering a critical issue that directly impacts daily operations.

Issue description

  • When editing an employee record in the new Edit & History UI (for example, updating the Cost Center),
  • Other mandatory fields unexpectedly become empty.
  • When those empty fields are reselected or corrected, additional fields become empty again.
  • This cycle makes it extremely difficult and error-prone to save valid changes.

Impact

  • The issue significantly blocks administrative maintenance of Employee Central data.
  • We cannot simplify or relax our business rules or object definitions, as they are essential for system integrity and downstream processes.

Question

  • Is SAP aware of this behavior in the new Edit & History UI?
  • Will SAP investigate this issue and provide a fix or guidance on how this should be handled?

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Employee Profile

entry.title: Improvement Request: Ability for Admins to Permanently Delete Stalled Workflows in Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m looking for input from other SuccessFactors customers regarding a workflow management challenge in Employee Central.

🔍The Challenge

When a workflow becomes stuck in a pending or stalled status, administrators currently have no standard way to remove it. Although approvers can decline workflows, there is no central administrative function that allows specific workflow IDs to be permanently deleted.

Over time, these stalled workflows accumulate, creating clutter, confusion, and unnecessary administrative effort for employees, managers, HRBPs, and administrators.

💡Suggested Enhancement

We’ve submitted an SAP Influence idea proposing the introduction of a feature that would allow administrators to:

  • Permanently delete stalled or obsolete workflows, and
  • Control access to this capability via Role-Based Permissions (RBP)

This would provide a secure and efficient way to keep workflow data clean and manageable.

🌍Why This Matters

Many organizations would benefit from this enhancement. Key advantages include:

  • Stronger data governance
  • Cleaner and more manageable workflow queues
  • Reduced inbox clutter
  • Improved administrative efficiency
  • Enhanced audit and compliance control
  • Better overall system performance
  • A smoother user experience for all roles

If your organization faces similar challenges, I’d really appreciate your support.
You can view and vote for the idea here:
👉 Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

I’d also be interested to hear how others are handling stalled workflows today.

Your feedback and support mean a lot.

Alina

entry.title: Recalculation of holiday quotas after removal of fixed term
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

When an employee’s fixed-term contract is converted to a permanent one, the recalculation of their holiday entitlement should be triggered automatically and the updated figures should be recorded in the Time Account.

We have already tried this using a rule and via an Integration Centre job. Unfortunately, neither method triggered the recalculation. The end date of the fixed-term contract is included in the job information.

Has anyone else implemented this before?

Thanks in advance 🙂

entry.title: Three dots in Performance Management Form
entry.content:
Hello,

is there a way to modify the icon with the 3 dots in the PMP? example, rename it; instead of having 3 dots, name it Edit or modify?

Thank you,

Diana

entry.title: Hi, What is the best way for security reports for auditing purpose?
entry.content:
Since role are tied to Positions and If employee is transferred to position which is tied to a Admin security role and we need to create report to capture such scenario so we can work with business as audit the roles and access.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Certification
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have started learning SAP EC and would like to what are my options to get certified?

Previously, there used to be an option where we can individually register for a certification for a fee and have 6 months to complete a certification. But now, I am not able to view that option anymore.

My company doesn't use SAP, so I cannot subscribe as a Customer / Partner and I am not a student.

Could someone please let me know what is my option to get certified as an individual?

Thank you,

Sree

#certification SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: People Seach - New UI
entry.content: Hello, I am trying to see if the new People Profile UI can have the same capability of current environment to be able to highlighting someone's name on their profile and being able to automatically see their organization and hitting if they are active or inactive. Has anyone figured this out? Please let me know.

entry.title: Request for Support: Employee Not a Valid EC User
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community Team,

I hope you are doing well.

We are facing an issue with an employee who is currently not recognized as a valid EC user. This employee is a rehired employee, and due to this, they are not being considered correctly in the system.

Could you please guide us on how to make this employee a valid EC user? This is required for further processing on our end.

Your support in resolving this issue would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,
varalakshmi.p-ext@syensqo.com

entry.title: Field Visibility Between Story Reports and Canvas Reports in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I’m observing an inconsistency in SuccessFactors reporting behavior related to the Position object.
Fields that are disabled at the Position object level do not appear in Canvas Reports, which is the expected behavior. However, the same disabled fields continue to be visible in Story Reports.

Is this expected system behavior for Story Reports, or is there an additional configuration required to control field visibility consistently across both reporting types?

Regards,

Ravi

entry.title: Excluding users with dummy email address from IC Job
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

As per requirement, I need to exclude users with dummy email address from Integration Center Job in SAP SuccessFactors. However, after applying the following filters, the system is also filtering out users with blank email addresses, which is not intended (users with blank email addresses should be included).

Please provide guidance on how to filter exclusively for users with dummy email addresses (where the Email Address Type is Business).

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: RBP Permissions have been affected with the new people profile.
entry.content:
The Role based permissions have been affected with the New People profile. It has made the information available to all the employees irrespective of the old permissions. Ideally, they should have taken care of the old permissions.

Also, when you wish to select the RBP in the Configure Latest People profile, it automatically selects that permission for all the roles, it doesn't even show which groups are getting affected.

It is really risky and there is no clarity on the configuration and the roles which are being impacted via the upgrade to Employee Profile.

As per the information on help.sap.com, RBPs were supposed to remain the same, but it seems like a lot has been impacted with the upgrade of people profile. Not at all happy with this.

entry.title: The Tax Treatment field in the Pay Component Foundation Object- SAP Successfactors "1H 2026 release"
entry.content:
Hello Everyone-

1H/2026 SF update says "The Tax Treatment field in the Pay Component Foundation Object will reach End of Maintenance on May 15,2026 and will be Deleted on November 13, 2026.". 

My customer has data maintained in this field in Pay Components ( Manage Org Pay), However this field is not enabled in MBCUI.

Would there still be any impact if this field in depreciated, What action do  we need to take? 

Source- https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-release-information/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/f5bf56452d294c4ba7172d467abb40ee.html?q=tax+treatment

entry.title: Layout of company news on the latest homepage
entry.content: Hello, is it possible to display the Cards in the Organisational News-Section of the latest homepage in a different layout (e.g. one below the other) rather than as a carousel?

entry.title: Manager as on date using business rule
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any way to find out manager as of a specific date using business rules, specifically the Base Object-Job Information Model or the Compensation Information Model?

I have attempted various functions that are available; however, all of them only return the manager as of today, regardless of the date conditions.

Best Regards,

entry.title: Time Sheet Period is read as Null
entry.content:
I am setting up an error for the time sheet. I am attaching it to the Employee Time Sheet object so that it will only display when the user Submits the time sheet. The customer would like the Time Sheet Period to display in the message. I have set up the tags in the Message Definition. In the Business Rule, I have set it to read the Time Sheet Period. When the message is triggered, though, it comes back as Null. 

 

I see the time sheet period displayed in the Employee Time Sheet Object.

I have run a rule trace, and it is returning Null as the value. 

I have checked permissions and it looks like I have full permission to the Employee Time Sheet object.

Any ideas why this is not working?

Thanks,

Cindy

entry.title: job level - pay range association
entry.content:
Hi ,

We want the pay range to be determined solely based on job level, which is maintained in a custom MDF object within Job Classification, rather than the pay grade maintained in Job Information. 

Specifically, the pay range should be derived from a custom MDF field (ABC) in Job Information, then Job Level(12) in the Job Classification object. We do not want the Pay Grade (SG1) foundation object to be part of this association. However, all employees will continue to have a pay grade assigned in Job Information, and we do not intend to change that.

Given this scenario, please advise on the best approach to create the pay range association in the Corporate Data Model. We also want to use these pay ranges in Compensation Planning, 

 

Thank you

entry.title: People Intelligence Reports
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Can you tell me if the SuccessFactors People Intelligence Reports will allow us to generate reports that combine data from Employee Central, Employee Central Payroll, and Time Tracking?
When will this feature be available?
Thank you!
Best regards,

Carolina

#People Intelligence Report

#SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

#SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll 

#SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking

entry.title: Errors while new hiring
entry.content: While making new hire, i got error as The following fields have invalid value: Company, Division, Department while add new employee in SuccessFactors. I tried to fix the associations using Configure Object Definitions for Department, division, position and also with manage business configuration, but still the errors. Tried many ways, but still.

entry.title: 1H Release 2026 Enhancements in Business Configuration UI
entry.content: With the 1H Release of Business Configuration UI enhancements, will this impact MDF data we've already set up in our instance, or only impact new objects?
